posts.author: Rajesh_kumar_Singh
posts.community: Sasken - Not so good company but can be good investment?
posts.text: Nice to see some posts here now…. I was feeling lonely since many quarters. Even my last two posts were removed from value pickr….may be due to limit of continuous post from a single member. But I kept belief in Sasken that there is value…. remain invested. After Q4 result, all rewards came in cumulative way. Extreme non- linear nature of market thrills me.
